arts.ttl: Derby County v Coventry City live updates and team news from Pride Park
arts.sum: Get the latest Coventry City news sent straight to your phone by joining our Sky Blues WhatsApp group. Coventry City take on relegation battlers Derby County tonight looking to extend the club's incredible run of results to ten wins from 11 Championship matches - a sequence that has propelled the Sky Blues into the play-off places.

arts.ttl: Coventry City predicted team as Frank Lampard waits on fitness tests for injured duo v Derby - Andy Turner
arts.sum: Get the latest Coventry City news sent straight to your phone by joining our Sky Blues WhatsApp group. The City boss has injury doubts over winger Ephron Mason-Clark (toe) and right-back Milan van Ewijk (Achilles) after both players were forced to withdraw from Saturday’s 3-2 win over Stoke, meaning he could be forced into at least two changes.

arts.ttl: Derby County 'boom and bust' warning as EFL boss points to 'pretty terrifying figures'
arts.sum: EFL chairman Rick Parry has been pointing to the huge financial chasm between the top flight and the rest – and then between clubs in receipt of parachute payments and the rest beyond that – which encourages some owners to spend a lot more money than they bring in to try to win promotion to the big time. If you look at the amount of money that Championship clubs routinely spend on average on wages, it’s in excess of 100 per cent of turnover.

arts.ttl: Derby County target move for Championship rivals' transfer guru
arts.sum: Deboys, 31, is currently the head of recruitment at Cardiff, where he was tasked with reducing the squad's age and identifying players the club would profit from in the future. Join our Derby County WhatsApp group to get the latest Rams headlines sent straight to your phone.

arts.ttl: Inside Frank Lampard's incredible revival as Coventry boss makes history with winning run
arts.sum: Frank Lampard is enjoying a new lease of life at Coventry City where he has managed to transform the Championship back into play-off contenders after a difficult start to the season

arts.ttl: Wayne Rooney announcement made as former Derby County boss set for Man United return
arts.sum: Former Derby County head coach Wayne Rooney is set for a return to Manchester United to play in Soccer Aid for UNICEF 2025. Rooney spent almost two years in the dugout at Pride Park, winning 24 of his 85 matches before departing following the club's relegation to League One.

arts.ttl: Derby County injury update as John Eustace addresses defender concern

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola made his Frank Lampard feelings clear as he's tipped to become Rangers boss
arts.sum: It's been suggested Rangers should go all out to secure the services of Frank Lampard, who has the backing of one of the best in the managerial game in Pep Guardiola
